sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id Int32, value1 Float64, value2 Float64 DEFAULT NULL, value3 String, created_at DateTime) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value1, value2, value3, created_at) VALUES (1, 2.0, 4.0, 'hello', now()), (2, 3.0, NULL, '', now()), (3, 1.5, 2.3, 'world', now());
SELECT id, pow(value1, 2) AS squared_value FROM test_table WHERE squared_value NOT IN (SELECT MAX(pow(value2, 2)) FROM test_table WHERE value2 IS NOT NULL);
SELECT id, count(*) AS count_values FROM (SELECT id, value1, value2, pow(value1, value2) AS pow_value FROM test_table) GROUP BY id HAVING count_values > 1;
SELECT t1.id, t1.value1, t2.value2 FROM test_table t1 JOIN (SELECT id, value2 FROM test_table WHERE value2 IS NOT NULL AND value2 NOT IN (SELECT value1 FROM test_table)) t2 ON t1.id = t2.id;
SELECT id, GLOBAL NOT IN (pow(value1, 2)) AS exclusion FROM (SELECT id, pow(value1, 2) AS power_value FROM test_table WHERE value1 < 5 GROUP BY id) HAVING exclusion IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, pow(COALESCE(value2, 1), 3) AS cubed_value FROM test_table WHERE cubed_value > 10;
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_table AS SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE value1 IS NOT NULL;
SELECT t1.id, t1.value1, t2.value2 FROM test_table t1 LEFT JOIN temp_table t2 ON t1.id = t2.id WHERE t2.id IS NULL;
SELECT id, COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT id, value3 FROM test_table WHERE value3 != '' AND value3 NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT value3 FROM test_table WHERE value2 IS NULL)) GROUP BY id HAVING COUNT(*) > 0;
